DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM AS TO DONNA TRUAZ ONLY - NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND TO STRIKE CLAIM AS TO DONNA TRUAX ONLY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE CLAIM OF DONNA TRUAX IS ORDERED STRICKEN. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
POS OF ORDER STRIKING THE CLIAM OF DONNA TRUAX FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $635.00 IS DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF H&S CODE SECTION 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim As To Donna Truaz Only
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And To Strike Claim As To Donna Truax Only is granted. No opposition has been filed. The claim of Donna Truax is ordered stricken. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Pamela Underwood, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: People of the State of California; no appearance for defendant

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion to compel Answers to Petitioner's First Set of Demand for Production and Inspection of Documents; Petitioner's First Set of Special Interrogatories, Judicial Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this motion. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
